search_queries_used: site:dha.gov.ae best practice immunization guideline DHA/PHPD/CG-04
site:doh.gov.ae child vaccination standard Abu Dhabi
site:ehs.gov.ae national immunization programme child UAE
site:who.int immunization practice vaccination screening children
candidate_sources_rejected: older UAE childhood immunization schedule documents
rejection_reasons: The EHS page is a service description rather than the detailed clinical practice source.
Older schedule documents were not used because the current DHA Issue 4 guideline was available.
population_applicability: Partial: the source contains childhood and school-age immunization recommendations, while the baseline does not define an age or vaccine-specific context.
setting_applicability: Partial: exact source applies to DHA-licensed Dubai facilities; the baseline is setting-agnostic.
UAE_applicability: Verified for all DHA-licensed healthcare settings in Dubai, United Arab Emirates; broader UAE application is not asserted.
recency_verification: Official Issue 4 copy dated 2026-01-27 and opened on 2026-07-11; revision date 2031-01-26.
superseded_check: Issue 4 was the current official copy identified on the DHA site on 2026-07-11.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports child immunization visit and schedule terminology in DHA-licensed settings.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Defines DHA immunization scope and the national childhood programme and schedule context.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports vaccination-history review and age-appropriate schedule or catch-up documentation.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Requires review of the child vaccination history, use of age-appropriate catch-up scheduling, and completion without restarting a series solely because of elapsed time.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped illness, severe previous reaction, and immunosuppression screening prompts.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Requires screening before each dose and identifies severe previous reaction, acute illness severity, and immunosuppression-related precautions.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports consent context, current illness, medication, prior reaction, recent vaccine, and scheduled-dose screening documentation.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Defines consent context, scheduled-dose and history checks, illness, previous severe reaction, immune status, medication and recent-vaccine screening.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports clinician-documented benefits, risks, common effects, after-care, questions, and return-advice discussion.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Requires benefits and risks discussion and after-care information on common effects, when to seek attention, and when to notify the facility.

unresolved_source_gaps: The baseline is not vaccine-specific and is broader than the reviewed childhood schedule and Dubai setting.
Well-appearing and afebrile findings are patient-specific conclusions and remain unsupported unless clinician-entered.
No vaccine product, dose, route, or administration instruction is promoted by this mapping.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
